## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run format:check`
- [ ] `npm run check`
- [ ] `npm run build`

## Screenshots

Add screenshots for visible changes, or state that the change has no visual impact.

## Checklist

- [ ] The change is focused and documented
- [ ] No secrets or generated files are committed
- [ ] Links and responsive behavior were checked when applicable
